heading: Annual report on electromagnetic spectrum operations strategy of the Department of Defense
label: 500b Annual report on electromagnetic spectrum operations strategy of the Department of Defense
notes: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to annual reports on the electromagnetic spectrum operations strategy of the Department of Defense, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 502 of this title
amendments: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to annual reports on the electromagnetic spectrum operations strategy of the Department of Defense, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 502 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: At the same time as the President submits to Congress the budget of the President under for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029, the Secretary of Defense, in coordination with the Chief Information Officer of the Department of Defense, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, and the Secretary of each of the military departments, shall submit to the congressional defense committees an annual report on the Electromagnetic Spectrum Superiority Strategy of the Department of Defense.section 1105(a) of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: the electromagnetic spectrum strategy of the Department of Defense;

children.label: B
children.text: how such strategy supports the national defense strategy under ; andsection 113(g) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the organizational structure assigned to oversee the development of the Department’s electromagnetic spectrum strategy, requirements, capabilities, programs, and projects.

A list of all the electromagnetic spectrum operations acquisition programs and research and development projects of the Department of Defense and a description of how each program or project supports the Department’s electromagnetic spectrum strategy.

children.label: A
children.text: the senior acquisition executive and organization responsible for oversight of the program or project;

children.label: B
children.text: whether or not validated requirements exist for the program or project and, if such requirements do exist, the date on which the requirements were validated and the organizational authority that validated such requirements;

children.label: C
children.text: the total amount of funding appropriated, obligated, and forecasted by fiscal year for the program or project, including the program element or procurement line number from which the program or project receives funding;

children.label: D
children.text: the development or procurement schedule for the program or project;

children.label: E
children.text: an assessment of the cost, schedule, and performance of the program or project as it relates to the program baseline for the program or project, as of the date of the submission of the report, and the original program baseline for such program or project, if such baselines are not the same;

children.label: F
children.text: the technology readiness level of each critical technology that is part of the program or project;

children.label: G
children.text: whether or not the program or project is redundant or overlaps with the efforts of another military department; and

children.label: H
children.text: the capability gap that the program or project is being developed or procured to fulfill.
A classified annex that contains the items described in subparagraphs (A) through (H) of paragraph (3) for each classified program or project on the list required by paragraph (2).
